_comment: ClawMux configuration — copy this file to clawmux.json and adjust values.

compression._comment_threshold: Token ratio (0.1–0.95) that triggers context compression.
compression._comment_model: Model ID used for the compression summarisation call.
compression._comment_targetRatio: Desired compression ratio (0.2–0.9). 0.6 = compress to 60% of original.

models._comment_models: Model IDs for each routing tier. Do NOT use values containing 'clawmux' — this causes infinite loops.

scoring._comment_confidence: Minimum confidence (0.0–1.0) to auto-route. Below this, falls back to HEAVY.
